sections.paragraph:
Original: גּתּה־חפר גּת־החפר

Transliteration: gath-hachêpher gittâh-chêpher

Phonetic: gath-hah-khay'-fer

BDB Definition:

Gath-hepher or Gittah-hepher = "the winepress of digging"
  1. home town of Jonah on the border of Zebulun

Origin: from H1660 and H2658 with the article inserted

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
